techniques.name: SplitText char reveal
techniques.notes: Strong for hero headlines + editorial sections. Needs mask:true for polish. Weak on short copy. Reference sites confirm high impact.

techniques.name: Clip-path image reveal
techniques.notes: Top performer for visual sections. Works best with high-contrast imagery. Avoid on small elements. Reference sites validate as core technique.

techniques.name: Parallax depth layers
techniques.notes: Reliable depth technique. Always use scrub:0.5. Diminishing returns past 3 layers.

techniques.name: Magnetic buttons
techniques.notes: Good craft signal but subtle. Must disable on touch. Works best with scale + border feedback.

techniques.name: Counter/ticker animation
techniques.notes: Effective for stats sections. Needs intersection observer trigger. Avoid decimals.

techniques.name: Stagger cascade
techniques.notes: Workhorse for grids/features. Use ScrollTrigger.batch(). Range 0.03-0.08 per item. Reference sites confirm as essential pattern.

techniques.name: Gradient mesh atmosphere
techniques.notes: Adds depth cheaply but can feel generic. Needs low opacity (2-4%) and hue variation.

techniques.name: Spline 3D scene
techniques.notes: High impact but heavy. Requires dynamic import + fallback image. Loading UX is critical.

techniques.name: Grain/noise overlay
techniques.notes: Film grain at 2-4% opacity on dark sections. Name element site-grain or noise-layer for observer detection.

techniques.name: Curtain wipe reveal
techniques.notes: Highest single score. Used in cyberpunk hero with lime curtain 580ms. Must use cubic-bezier(0.77,0,0.175,1). Needs validation in other contexts.

techniques.name: Clip-path accordion
techniques.notes: Clip-path curtain accordion 420ms for FAQ items. Numeral color transitions add craft.

techniques.name: Glitch signature
techniques.notes: 3-layer RGB split hover on team cards. Status dot pulse adds life. Best in cyberpunk/dark contexts.

techniques.name: Curtain hover reveal
techniques.notes: Neon curtain 480ms per-card with content inversion on hover. Card lift y:-8.

_meta.cleanReason: Audit V1: removed 10 phantom/duplicate entries (SplitText, clip-path, stagger, scrub, grain, noise, GSAP, ScrollTrigger, Lenis, WebGL). Merged reference evidence into parent techniques. Added confidence field. 22 -> 13 entries.
